response.overview: Described as a Twilight Zone episode with themes reminiscent of Vince Gilligan’s PLUR1BUS and Gore Verbinski’s Good Luck, Have Fun, Don’t Die, the film follows the confrontation between two former best friends — one consumed by a digital virus that reshapes him into something unnervingly pleasant and inhuman, and the other a human who refuses to accept the help of the infected.
response.title: Untitled Aaron Grospe Project
